channel.title: Example Feed
channel.description: An example RSS 2.0 feed for tests

item.title: First Post About Widgets
item.description:
Widgets are wonderful and worth reading about at length.

This second paragraph gives the article enough body to pass the length check comfortably.

item.title: Second Post About Gadgets
item.description: Gadgets deserve their own thorough discussion here, with enough words to be a real article body worth ingesting.
